_comment: Canonical record history. Edit this file, then run scripts/update_leaderboard.py to regenerate README + RECORDS.md. CI fails if they drift.

records.author: Saivineeth147
records.description: Baseline: plain LoRA r=16 on all linear layers, 3 epochs, cosine LR. No tricks.
records.notes: Seed record at track freeze (tag spec-v1-frozen). 3/3 runs clear the 57.0% target.

records.author: Saivineeth147
records.description: Sequence packing + completion-only loss masking, 2 epochs. Same LoRA config as #0; ~2x faster at higher accuracy.
records.notes: Eliminates the baseline's padding waste (packing) and prompt-token loss (completion-only masking). Adapter identical to #0, so the gain is pure data-pipeline.
